title: Nursery Rhyme. CCLXXV. Gaffers And Gammers.
content:
A little old man of Derby,
        How do you think he served me?
        He took away my bread and cheese,
        And that is how he served me.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Unknown, titled "Nursery Rhyme. CCLXXV. Gaffers And Gammers.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
